description: Mysore is a royal heritage city known for its majestic palaces, rich history and refined cultural charm. Famous for the grand Mysore Palace, silk sarees, sandalwood works and traditional art forms, Mysore offers a beautiful blend of royalty and serenity. Explore illuminated palaces, scenic gardens, historic temples, Chamundi Hills, vibrant markets and the elegant architecture that reflects the legacy of the Wodeyar dynasty. Whether you are admiring the palace lights, enjoying local Mysore Pak sweets, or walking through calm palace courtyards — Mysore gives a timeless travel experience filled with royal grandeur and cultural pride.

Any portage at airports and hotels, tips, insurance, wine, mineral water, telephone charges, and all items of personal nature.

Anything Not mentioned in inclusions.

faqs.title: 1) What is Mysore famous for?
faqs.content: Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills, Mysore Silk, Sandalwood products & Mysore Pak.

faqs.title: 2) Best time to visit Mysore?
faqs.content: October to February — pleasant weather & best for sightseeing.

faqs.title: 3) Is Mysore Palace entry included?
faqs.content: It depends on the package — entry tickets can be added on request.

faqs.title: 4) What are the must-visit attractions?
faqs.content: Mysore Palace, Chamundi Hills, Brindavan Gardens, Mysore Zoo, St. Philomena’s Church, local markets.

faqs.title: 5) What should we carry?
faqs.content: Comfortable footwear, sunglasses, sunscreen and light clothes (or light jacket if winter).
